scope: Every engine site that reads a slice's machine contract reads spec.json (spec-v1) as authoritative with spec.md as legacy fallback only, so the parallel loop drives a spec.json-only release end-to-end instead of hard-failing on a missing spec.md (sworn#97).

reachability_artifacts: internal/run/spec_json_reach_test.go:TestRunSlice_SpecJSONOnly_ReachesImplement drives run.RunSlice (the engine integration point the scheduler worker calls per slice for the parallel loop) on a spec.json-only slice with NO spec.md; it reaches the implement dispatch and completes to PASS with the sworn#97 spec.md-missing error asserted ABSENT (the exact dogfood failure, now cleared).

Live CLI corroboration on the release's own spec.json-only slices: `sworn specquality 2026-07-11-loop-operability` -> PASS on S01/S02/S03 (a guaranteed 'no acceptance examples' violation before the PIN-2 fix); `sworn lint ac 2026-07-11-loop-operability` -> reads all 6 S01 ACs from spec.json, classifies EARS, 'Violations: none'. Both prove gate sites read spec.json without hard-failing.
internal/implement/spec_json_read_test.go:TestRun_SpecJSONOnly_ReadsSpecJSON drives implement.Run on a spec.json-only slice and asserts the implementer prompt is built from spec.json (AC-01).
delivered: AC-01: engine implement leg reads spec.json on a spec.json-only slice without the spec.md-missing error — internal/implement/implement.go (spec.LoadSpec); TestRun_SpecJSONOnly_ReadsSpecJSON

AC-02: spec.json authoritative when both present, spec.md legacy fallback when absent, single shared precedence helper — internal/spec/spec.go:LoadSpec; TestRun_SpecJSONAuthoritative_OverSpecMD + TestRun_SpecMDLegacyFallback

Coach Pin 2 fold-in: gate/llmcheck.go, lint/touchpoints.go, cmd/sworn/task.go migrated to spec.json-preferred (no longer hard-fail / re-introduce the legacy spec.md contract on the on-ramp) — plus run.setupSlice emits authoritative spec.json (CHOICE-B)

not_delivered: Model-backed `sworn verify` (agentic proof-bundle gate) and `sworn llm-check --check ac-satisfaction` could not run in this implementer session: no SWORN_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY available. Tracked as the mandatory Rule 7 verifier handoff (no separate issue — the verifier session owns it).
divergence: internal/run/slice.go was edited although the declared touchpoints list only internal/run/run.go. slice.go is a sibling file in the SAME internal/run package: its RunSlice design/captain/verify legs and first-pass gate read the spec directly and the verify leg hard-failed on a missing spec.md, so routing them through the shared spec loader was required to deliver AC-05 end-to-end. No other track owns internal/run. Surfaced (Rule 2), not absorbed silently.

internal/spec/spec.go was edited (add LoadSpec/RenderMarkdown/SpecFilePath/AC.TestRefs) — the shared read primitive the spec named under in_scope and the Coach-ratified AC.TestRefs extension (Pin 1); not enumerated in the touchpoints array but the single source of the precedence.

The reference CLI exposes the parallel loop as `sworn loop --parallel` (spec wording says `sworn run --parallel`); the underlying engine entrypoint (run.RunSlice via the scheduler worker) is identical and AC-05's reachability test drives it directly.

`sworn lint trace 2026-07-11-loop-operability` reports NOT TRACEABLE, but the violations are pre-existing requirements-fidelity gaps in the release artefacts (N-01/N-02/N-03 absent from intake.md; ACs do not cite needs inline) — a planner concern independent of S01's spec-read scope; trace correctly reads the spec.json ACs (not a regression from this slice).
